news.t: Dual Commencement: The Russell Index Shift to Semi-Annual Rebalancing

holdings.infoBox: TNA is an equity ETF with a total of 20 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares Russell 2000 ETF stock at 67.67%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 18.30%, Russ 2000 Indx Small Swap at 6.72%, Russ 2000 Indx Small Swap at 4.94%, and Russ 2000 Indx Small Swap at 4.74%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Small Cap Bull 3X ETF (TNA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap companies. TNA was launched on Nov 5, 2008 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Dual Commencement: The Russell Index Shift to Semi-Annual Rebalancing
data.text: June is typically reserved for graduation processionals, with the “Pomp and Circumstance March No. 1 in D” blaring from PA systems or high-fidelity systems (depending on how well-funded the school is)...

data.title: Terra Nova (Bermuda) Holdings falls -12.6%
data.text: Terra Nova (Bermuda) Holdings (TNA) is down -12.6%, or -$2.68 to $18.64.
